title: PARTY GO 50 Pcs 9" Paper Plates for Dinner and Dessert, Disposable Plates Party Supplies Pack for Graduation Holiday Wedding Birthday Party Baby Shower Decorations, Pink
features: 【9 Inch × Pink × 50 Paper Plates】You will receive a solid pink color plates set. Including 50pcs 9" pink paper Plates, perfect for many theme party.

【Premium Material】All the paper tablewares are made of quality paper, non-toxic, no smell, heat-resistant, thick and sturdy enough to hold food and desserts. The color are well-printed and fade-resistant to provide you a perfect party.

【Fit Most Occasions】These Pink Color theme party packs are a perfect complement to most occasions, such as Birthday party, Graduation, Anniversary, Baby Shower, Holidays, Celebrations and so on. They will easily catch people's eyes and bring them happy.

【Enjoy Your Party】The party plates can save your cleaning time due to the disposable design, simply throw them into the trash after the event. You can spend more time enjoying the party and accompanying your family and friends.
【Perfect Design】Featuring pure color style design, decorating your theme party with these disposable plates, cups and napkins can make your party looks more funny and impressive.
